summary: Completed backend+frontend regression for FITSIOMAX OS v3 requested fixes using public URL. Role visibility and completion flows now work for head physio/physio; role-aware loading removed repeated restricted sheets 403 calls; branch booking doctor select remains functional after rendering fix.

minor.issue: Slot matching is strict string-equality; timezone-formatted ISO slots (e.g., +00:00) don’t match datetime-local values, causing false 'No doctors available' in mixed-format data.

action_items: Optional hardening: normalize slot_time format (or parse to datetime) in availability/booking checks to avoid mixed-format mismatch edge cases.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py is still very large (>2000 lines); split v1/v2/v3 routers/services for maintainability and safer future changes.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST/UI seed data via public APIs: branch + branch admin, doctor + slots, manual lead, qualified+assigned+confirmed lead, and new appointment.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated requested v3 fixes end-to-end on public URL. Head physio and physio now both see Today/New appointments and complete actions. No repeated restricted sheets 403 calls detected for these roles. Branch booking doctor select works when slot is created using UI datetime-local flow.
rca of the issue: Previously reported visibility blocker was tied to branch linkage/filtering behavior. Current run confirms role access and appointment listing behavior are corrected. Remaining minor edge case comes from slot_time format inconsistency (ISO timezone string vs datetime-local string), which can hide available doctors in mixed-source data.
